name: Spinach Squares
recipeIngredient: 20 oz spinach, frozen, chopped (thawed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk, flour, eggs, baking powder, and garlic in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Add the spinach, cheese, black olives, and pepperoni to the mixture.
3. Melt butter in the bottom of a 9 x 12 pan.
4. Pour the spinach mixture into the pan and spread it evenly.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes or until the edges are brown.
6. These can be eaten hot or warm; they cut easier when they are cooler.
